title: Value ledger: events + replay receipts (verified v2.2.1)
summary: Ledger at .agent memory/reports/value.json: recall served with replay tokens , stale withheld, caller answered, stale caught; valueSummary feeds kage gains and the viewer Gains tab $ at ~15/1M . Receipts report max read
body: Ledger at .agent_memory/reports/value.json: recall_served (with replay_tokens), stale_withheld, caller_answered, stale_caught; valueSummary feeds kage gains and the viewer Gains tab ($ at ~15/1M). Receipts report max(read-vs-source, replay). Non-empty kage file-context injections record events. Unchanged by 2.2.1.
